original: The haughty peer gloats down at you from across the room, somehow managing to appear unbothered by the intrusion of an offworlder and [pc.hisHer] mercenary assistant. She watches you with the sort of matriarchal displeasure a mother might lavish upon a prodigal [pc.sonDaughter]. For her part she seems unmoved to directly attack you, but her pet... when she looks at her pet, the hardest parts of her statuesque features soften.

original: Meeker than the other peer in the fight, this one’s face twists with worry and concern for her pet, yet not a single ounce of fear of you. Fear of her cohorts’ disdain is a far more powerful motivator. Her green visor, stylish skirt, and padded shoulders would make her a real hit at one of Dhaal’s clubs - or [targetFactionName]’s boardrooms.

original: Sultry, simmering red eyes sweep across you dismissively. The spy’s lips seem locked in a knowing smile, convinced of her own untested superiority. Her curves wiggle this way and that with her every threatening motion, distracting and dangerous - though not nearly as dangerous as the acid-laced fighting knife hanging off her hip or her matched pistols. You get the sense that for all her bravado and deadly weapons, she’ll fall apart with the right kind of provocation...

original: All the confidence has slipped out of the spy’s crimson eyes. In its place something else has risen, something flickering yet fierce. She bites her lip when she looks at you. When she moves, you swear you hear a faint fluid sloshing from inside her suit. She can’t even try to hide the flush spreading across her cheeks or the cute little pants coming out of her mouth when she sees you move. All you have to do is keep turning her on, and she’ll fold like a house of cards.
context: <<POS:05557215>> this.long='All the confidence has slipped out of the spy’s crimson eyes'

original: The spy’s healing stim did more than heal her wounds. It flushed her cheeks. It lit flames of arousal that flicker behind her determined, crimson eyes. Sure, she still holds her weapons just as dangerously as before, and her hips sway with enough agility to sidestep the deadliest plasma-bolt, but you’ve found a chink in her armor: arousal. If a little chemical stimulation can set the curvaceous femme fatale aflutter, then a hands-on approach could do oh so much more!
context: <<POS:05557744>> this.long='The spy’s healing stim did more than heal her wounds. It flu'
